# pg-claude

> A meta repo that turns Claude Code into a long-term collaborator on
> PostgreSQL internals: a cited knowledge corpus (2,580 per-file source
> notes, 100% strict coverage of the in-scope tree), 30 agent skills,
> 155 PG-wide idioms, 127 issue registers, and 50+ session logs.
> Two side-by-side upstream clones are mounted
> via symlinks: `source/` (read-only reference) and `dev/` (mutable
> test field). Every concrete claim about PG behavior is cited at
> `source/<path>:<line>` or tagged `[unverified]`.

## Entry points

- [README.md](README.md): What pg-claude is, who it's for, quickstart.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Project contract — layout, working rules,
  cite-or-tag, two-repo separation.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Meta-repo vs upstream-PG
  contribution paths.

## Navigators

- [.claude/skills/pg-claude/SKILL.md](.claude/skills/pg-claude/SKILL.md):
  The master navigator skill — how a Claude Code session should move
  through this repo.
- [progress/STATE.md](progress/STATE.md): Current phase, what's done,
  what's next. Always re-read at session start.

## Knowledge corpus

- [knowledge/architecture/overview.md](knowledge/architecture/overview.md):
  Backend architecture overview — postmaster, backends, shared memory,
  WAL, MVCC.
- [knowledge/glossary.md](knowledge/glossary.md): PG-internals glossary
  with cited definitions.
- [knowledge/community/patch-workflow.md](knowledge/community/patch-workflow.md):
  Upstream PG patch lifecycle — `format-patch` → `pgsql-hackers` →
  CommitFest → committer.
- [knowledge/community/developer-faq-distilled.md](knowledge/community/developer-faq-distilled.md):
  Distilled FAQ for new PG hackers.

## Slash commands (high-leverage)

- [.claude/commands/setup-pg.md](.claude/commands/setup-pg.md): Configure +
  build PG into `dev/build-debug`.
- [.claude/commands/pg-review.md](.claude/commands/pg-review.md): The
  seven-phase upstream patch review checklist applied to a diff.
- [.claude/commands/pg-implement.md](.claude/commands/pg-implement.md):
  Phase-by-phase execution of a `planning/<slug>/plan.md`.

## Discipline

- [.claude/rules/pg-implement-discipline.md](.claude/rules/pg-implement-discipline.md):
  The 12 implementation rules (R1–R12) — one plan per branch, cite or
  don't claim, per-phase commits, two-repo separation.

## Sessions & progress

- [sessions/](sessions/): Append-only log of significant working
  sessions — one file per session, useful as worked examples.
- [progress/](progress/): `STATE.md`, `coverage.md`, `census.md`,
  `files-examined.md`.
